retry_reason: refcount_dec always executes and never fails; retrying would be a double-free bug.
contract_summary: bpf_kfunc_call_test_release releases one reference on a prog_test_ref_kfunc object by decrementing its refcount. After this call, the caller must not access the object unless it holds another valid reference. If the refcount reaches zero, the object may be freed. This is a standard put operation and must be paired with a previous get (e.g., bpf_kfunc_call_test_acquire) to maintain correct reference counting.
